emotional_tone: Objective, rigid, functional, high-performance, and trustworthy.

scale_rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none font-medium
scale_rules.code_blocks: font-mono text-sm bg-slate-50 text-slate-900 border border-slate-200

rules: No pure #000000 or #808080. Use tinted greys.
95% of the UI should be monochrome. Color exists only to guide action or indicate status (failed/passed PRs).
Text contrast must meet APCA standards.

grid_details.items: Every pixel utilized. Use h-full on children to stretch.

layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align dense content, tabular data, and forms. Center only for visual hierarchy in empty states.

surfaces_and_borders.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border, no shadow. Strict right angles or max 4px radius (rounded-sm).
surfaces_and_borders.header_nav: Crystal Glass variant if scrolling under (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-border/50). Solid background if content cuts off.
surfaces_and_borders.buttons: Sharp edges, 1px border. Dark monochrome or High-contrast Klein Blue for primary.

components_strategy.shadcn_customization: Go cardless or use strictly rectangular, dense styles. Do NOT overuse the standard Card component with soft shadows. Strip Vercel-look for Swiss Brutalist look.
components_strategy.forms_and_inputs: Use Shadcn components heavily customized. Flat, sharp borders. Focus rings must be tight and high contrast (ring-2 ring-blue-600).
components_strategy.tables: Use Shadcn tables. Zebra striping for dense data. Sticky headers. Right-align numbers.
components_strategy.icons: Use Phosphor Icons (yarn add @phosphor-icons/react) for dense developer tools.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: ALWAYS explicitly set text color on hover. Slight background darken.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Use specific properties (transition-colors, transition-opacity) duration-150 ease-out.

media_and_images.usage: Minimal imagery. Focus on typography, data, and layout.

image_urls.description: Abstract minimalist AI developer tool logo. Use for branding in header and login page.
Swiss style abstract geometric architectural background for the login/auth split-screen layout.

media_and_images.avatar_fallback: Use UI gradients or typographic initials for user/PR author avatars. Do not use generic placeholders.

testing.data_testid_convention: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the JSON guidelines for color, typography, and spacing.
Install required icon library: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react
Build the dashboard using a 'Control Room' grid approach with stark, high-contrast borders.
For the login page, use a split screen: left side contains the auth form, right side uses the 'login_background' image with a dark/blue gradient overlay to keep it architectural.
Make sure every interactive element has a data-testid.
